title: StackBox
description: Store up to 9.2 quintillion items of a single type in one compact, portable item!
body:
# StackBox
Infinite storage in your pocket.

StackBox is a simple, powerful mod that lets you store 9 quintillion (9,223,372,036,854,775,807) items of a single type in one inventory slot.

# Features
Massive Capacity: Never run out of space for cobblestone, dirt, or crops.
Auto-Collection: Automatically picks up matching items as you mine.
Direct Usage: Place blocks, eat food, and use buckets directly from the StackBox.
Lag Free: Optimized NBT storage prevents inventory lag.
# Quick Start
Craft a StackBox.
Sneak + Right-Click to open the menu.
Deposit items to clear your inventory.
Right-Click normally to use the stored item.
